key_items: White House announces imminent Strategic Bitcoin Reserve - major institutional adoption signal
SEC approves tokenized stocks framework opening crypto rails to equities market
Bitcoin ETF outflows ($649M) driven by long-term holder accumulation, not capitulation selling
reasoning: Positive structural catalysts (strategic reserve, tokenized stocks SEC approval, institutional custody consolidation) outweigh near-term macro headwinds and regulatory noise. However, recent 7% retracement to $76K and lack of fresh momentum prevent stronger bullish conviction in the 1-7 day timeframe.
risks: Macroeconomic pressure and Fed rate expectations could trigger further consolidation below $76K support if equity markets weaken or geopolitical tensions escalate.
